items.title: Design tokens and Bubble style utilities
items.scope: frontend — migrate ir/slices/styles.json (71 Bubble styles) into CSS custom properties and reusable utility classes under frontend/src/styles; resolve var(--color_*)/var(--font_*) references from Bubble presentation; no adapter routes and no writes under project/
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: frontend/src/styles/tokens.css exports CSS variables for all distinct --color_* and --font_* tokens referenced in styles.json (e.g. color_primary_default, color_surface_default, color_aiRNbAaxgr_default, font_default)

AC-2: frontend/src/styles/bubble-styles.css defines classes for each styles.json entry (Button_primary_, Text_body_, Group_card_, etc.) matching display name, typography, padding, border-radius, and hover states from IR
AC-3: frontend/src/styles/index.ts re-exports tokens and bubble-styles for feature modules; components resolve presentation.style_ref through these classes instead of hard-coded colors
items.layout_notes: Styles are global primitives, not page regions. Map Bubble fit_width/fit_height semantics to fluid CSS where styles.json properties use width:0 or fit flags; preserve hover/state blocks from styles.json states objects.

items.title: RE - progress bar reusable
items.scope: frontend — migrate RE - progress bar (bTIuS) HTML/CSS bar driven by numeric prop; visual-only reusable consumed by dashboard and paths pages; no adapter and no project/ writes
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ProgressBar.vue root renders with data-bubble-id="bTIuS" and accepts a 0–100 numeric value prop matching Bubble param type number
AC-2: Inner track (bTIua) and HTML fill region (bTIuZ) preserve row layout, 8px min-height track, border-radius 4, and primary fill color from IR presentation (var(--color_primary_default))
AC-3: Fill width scales proportionally to the value prop; bar uses DS-01 token/class references rather than inline hex colors
items.layout_notes: Tiny reusable (2 child elements): HTML element renders inline progress fill; parent Group bTIua is fit_height row track. Width is dynamic via HTML/CSS expression in Bubble — implement as percentage width on fill element.

items.title: RE - score bar reusable
items.scope: frontend — migrate RE - score bar (bTIHr) five-segment Likert/score indicator with numeric selection prop; shared across journal and check-in surfaces; frontend-only
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ScoreBar.vue root renders with data-bubble-id="bTIHr" and accepts a numeric score prop (1–5) plus optional segment labels via slots or props

AC-2: Five segment groups (bTIHw, bTIIC, bTIII, bTIIO, bTIIU) each contain a Shape child; selected segment uses var(--color_primary_default) fill, unselected segments use var(--color_aiRNbAaxgr_default) per IR
AC-3: HTML label region (bTIJL) preserves static copy and formatting from drsam-99657.bubble element_definitions/bTIHs; segment row uses flex row with 4px radius and 8px min-height track
items.layout_notes: Row of five equal segments inside muted track groups; each segment is a Group wrapping a Shape. Selection state toggles Shape bgcolor between primary and muted gray tokens. HTML element bTIJL sits below or beside bar for axis labels.

items.title: RE - session completion form reusable
items.scope: frontend — migrate RE - session completion form (bTIyi) bound to custom.pathsession parent data: session header, path-question repeating group with multiline answers, reflection checkbox group, and submit button; presentation-only stub for path workflows (no Supabase mutations in this item)
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: SessionCompletionForm.vue root renders with data-bubble-id="bTIyi" and accepts a pathsession-shaped prop; header group bTIyn shows session title (bTIxC, style Text_heading_2_) and subtitle (bTIxG, style Text_body_muted_) from parent data bindings

AC-2: RepeatingGroup bTIzA lists path questions (custom.pathquestion search binding) with cell group bTIzF: question label bTIzG (Text_label_) and MultiLineInput bTIzK (MultiLineInput_default_); reflection group bTIzS includes labels bTIzX/bTIzY and Checkbox bTIzc (Checkbox_default_)
AC-3: Submit Button bTIzk uses Button_primary_ styling and static label text from IR; plugin placeholder nodes bTJBC/bTJBI render as inert stubs preserving data-bubble-id markers for parity
items.layout_notes: Vertical stack: hero header card (Group_card_), repeating question cards with label above multiline input, reflection row with checkbox, full-width primary submit. RepeatingGroup uses list layout from RepeatingGroup_list_ style ref on container.

items.title: RE - chat header and messages panel
items.scope: frontend — migrate upper RE - chat (bTIRW) regions: panel header with coaching disclaimer badge (bTIRb) and scrollable messages repeating group (bTISK); accepts chatconversation prop; frontend-only, no adapter
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ChatHeader.vue renders data-bubble-id="bTIRb" with title texts bTIRh/bTIRi (Text_body_) and right badge group bTIRm containing accent badge bTIRn (Group_badge_accent_) with icon bTIRo and caption bTIRs

AC-2: ChatMessagesList.vue renders data-bubble-id="bTISK" with RepeatingGroup bTISM listing messages; user cells bTISQ show bubble text bTISS; assistant cells bTIUI nest icon groups bTIUK/bTIUP with texts bTIUQ/bTIUU preserving left/right alignment from IR
AC-3: Message list region uses Group_transparent_ container layout and scroll overflow; all typography and badge colors resolve through DS-01 style classes
items.layout_notes: Header is horizontal flex (title left, badge right). Messages area is vertical RepeatingGroup with alternating user (right-aligned bubble) and assistant (left-aligned with avatar icon column) cell templates. Preserve fit_width fluid semantics on message groups.

items.title: RE - chat composer, disclaimer, and shell
items.scope: frontend — migrate lower RE - chat (bTIRW) composer toolbar (bTITC), floating coaching disclaimer (bTIUh), and compose ChatReusable.vue shell exporting the full bTIRW reusable; frontend-only
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ChatComposer.vue renders data-bubble-id="bTITC" with mode buttons bTITI/bTITM/bTITN/bTITO, input group bTITS containing caption bTITU (Text_caption_) and Input bTITY (Input_default_), and send Button bTITZ (Button_primary_)
AC-2: ChatFloatingDisclaimer.vue renders data-bubble-id="bTIUh" FloatingGroup with HTML content region bTIne; positions as overlay/footer per IR z-index and collapse_when_hidden behavior

AC-3: ChatReusable.vue root renders data-bubble-id="bTIRW", accepts chatconversation prop, and composes ChatHeader, ChatMessagesList, ChatComposer, and ChatFloatingDisclaimer preserving vertical panel hierarchy from element_definitions/bTIRa
items.layout_notes: Composer sits fixed at panel bottom: row of mode icon buttons above input row (caption + text input + send). FloatingGroup disclaimer anchors above composer with HTML block. Shell stacks header, flex-grow messages, composer, optional floating disclaimer.
